name: Clinical Trial Timeline
input: Create a timeline diagram for a Phase III clinical trial: Screening Period (Weeks -4 to 0) involves informed consent, eligibility assessment, and baseline measurements. Randomization occurs at Week 0, splitting into Treatment Arm (Drug X 10mg daily) and Control Arm (Placebo). Treatment Period spans Weeks 0-52 with follow-up visits at Weeks 4, 12, 26, and 52. Primary endpoint assessment at Week 52. Extension Period (Weeks 52-104) is optional open-label. Safety follow-up at Week 56.
qualityCriteria: Chronological sequence is clear (left-to-right or top-to-bottom)
Week numbers are visible at each stage
Randomization branch point shows two arms clearly
Treatment vs Control arms are distinguishable
Extension period shown as optional/different styling
napkinBenchmark: Horizontal timeline with colored segments for each period, branch point at randomization shown as a fork, visit markers along the timeline, clean typography with week numbers.
